name: Salmon Fillets Buried in Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Place 4 pieces of salmon on 9 by 12 inch aluminum foil.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Heat a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Combine shallots, white wine, and vinegar.
6. Cook until most liquid evaporates.
7. Add remaining butter, salt, and white pepper to taste.
8. Place salmon parcels in oven for 15 minutes.
9. Remove from oven, unwrap, and broil near heat for about 2 minutes per side.
10. Arrange salmon on a platter and serve sauce separately.
11. Serves 4.
